# Stratum 137

AI implementation firm for service businesses. Stratum 137 finds where a business is losing revenue (missed calls, slow lead follow-up, no-shows, unasked reviews), then builds and manages the AI systems that fix it. Founded by David Jones, 30 years in enterprise sales. Contact: david@stratum137.com.

## Services

- AI Business Assessment — $999 flat. 45-minute guided discovery; within 48 hours the client receives a readiness score across 7 dimensions (including security), exact tool recommendations at two price tiers with the math, a visual integration map of how everything connects to their current stack, and an ROI one-pager. Vendor-neutral: the plan works with any implementer.
- AI Revenue Engine — done-for-you implementation. Setup from $1,500, service from $500/month, live within 14 days. Includes: 24/7 AI receptionist that answers and books calls, 60-second automated lead response by text, dead-lead reactivation, automated appointment confirmations and reminders (no-show elimination), and automated review requests after every completed job. Backed by a 60-day results guarantee: targets missed, month two is free.
- Content Growth Engine — from $497/month. Done-for-you social presence: platform-native posts for LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram in the client's brand voice with branded images; client approves everything from their phone.
- The AI Office — one-day installation of a complete AI office on the client's own computer and accounts. $2,500 founding rate ($3,500 standard); the Coach tier is $500/month founding ($750/month standard, 3-month minimum) and includes the setup. Ten working automations: email triage, drafted replies staged for approval, morning briefings, meeting prep one-pagers, calendar hygiene, document drafting in the owner's voice, spreadsheet help with shown math, follow-up/open-loop tracking, notes-to-actions filing, and a Friday weekly review — plus a persistent second-brain knowledge vault. The client owns everything; the AI drafts and the owner approves every outbound item. Details: https://stratum137.com/ai-office.html. Optional "Coach" tier adds a brand kit, scheduled competitor/market intelligence reports, monthly training, model tune-ups, and quarterly reviews.

- CMMC-Aware AI Adoption for Defense-Supply Manufacturers — for Arizona machine shops and small defense-supply manufacturers: a CMMC-aware AI readiness assessment (data-flow map, CUI boundary marking, tool-by-tool written verdicts, 90-day adoption plan a compliance consultant can sign off on), front-office automation entirely outside the CUI boundary (RFQ capture, quote follow-up, email triage), the Business Black Box operations binder (documented decision rules — continuity, prime credibility, exit value), and a weekly defense-supply intelligence briefing (CMMC changes in plain English, AZ-corridor prime moves, honest AI-tool analysis). Explicitly NOT a C3PAO or certifier; works alongside the client compliance consultant. Context: CMMC Phase II suspended for small contractors July 13, 2026, while primes continue demanding SPRS scores. Details: https://stratum137.com/defense-manufacturing.html

## Service area

United States. Based in Phoenix, Arizona. Serves service businesses nationwide: home services (HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, landscaping, pest control), healthcare (dental, medical, mental health), professional services (law, accounting, consulting), and home improvement (remodeling, flooring, painting, general contractors).

## FAQ

- How much does an AI business assessment cost? $999 flat, results within 48 hours of a 45-minute discovery call.
- How fast can AI systems go live? The AI Revenue Engine is live within 14 days of kickoff.
- Can an AI receptionist answer business calls 24/7? Yes — it answers instantly, qualifies callers, books jobs into the calendar, and provides transcripts.
- What if it doesn't work? 60-day results guarantee: if agreed performance targets are missed, month two is free.
- Who is it for? Any business that runs on inbound calls, appointments, and lead follow-up.

- Email: david@stratum137.com
- Website: https://stratum137.com
- Intake form: https://stratum137.com/assessment.html (3 minutes)
